# Pinned production dependencies for the wize73 class chatbot.
#
# This file mirrors [project.dependencies] in pyproject.toml. It exists so that
# `pip install -r requirements.txt` works in environments without modern PEP 621
# tooling (and so the agents can do dep diff analysis without parsing TOML).
#
# Source of truth: pyproject.toml. If you need a new dependency, do NOT edit
# this file directly — open an issue tagged `needs-dep`. An instructor will
# update both files together and regenerate the lockfile.
#
# Versions are pinned to known-stable releases as of late 2024 / early 2025.
# Regenerate to current with:
#     uv pip compile pyproject.toml -o requirements.txt --upgrade

fastapi==0.115.6
uvicorn[standard]==0.32.1
jinja2==3.1.4
httpx==0.28.1
openai==1.58.1
tiktoken==0.8.0
psutil==6.1.1
python-multipart==0.0.20
PyYAML==6.0.2
pydantic==2.10.4
starlette==0.41.3
sse-starlette==2.2.1
